element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Insect-launching pistol with bug ammunition, single-form exploration
Bo staff for short-range combat and vertical exploration (climbing narrow tunnels), unlocked through story progression
Form-switching at will after Level 2, gated by ninja token collection; skill progression through token accumulation increases combo chain length
Currency for transformations; Mega Drive version uses red tokens for strength scaling, white tokens for metamorphosis
Maui-only mechanic; certain levels lock out Cold Shadow form, forcing vine-based platforming
Bug ammunition combinations increase effect; Cold Shadow staff chains grow longer with token investment
Lava, native traps, sacrifice sequences; escalates tension dramatically mid-game
Recovering remains from sea bottom; tests both forms under pressure
Spiritual journey, final skill test before endgame confrontation
Culmination of all mechanics; form-switching and resource management under pressure

typical_relief_triggers: Form transformation into Cold Shadow (mechanical relief)
Safe platforming passages with clear sightlines
Story progression moments between action sequences
typical_tension_triggers: Introduction of form-locked levels (forced single-character challenge)
Platforming segments requiring precision with inadequate forms
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation from detective roleplay through martial arts transformation, peaking at environmental hazards (volcano) mid-game, sustained tension through underwater recovery and spiritual trials, culminating in boss confrontation. Breathing room provided by form-switching mechanic offering tactical variety.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Ninja token placement encourages exploration; token scarcity forces careful level pathing

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of Maui's basic insect-launching mechanics in tropical setting; learning combat fundamentals with single-form constraints
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Form-switching mastery demanded; environmental hazards escalate (volcano sacrifice sequence represents major difficulty spike); resource management becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained high difficulty through underwater recovery and spiritual trials; boss preparation requiring integrated knowledge of both forms and token economy
notable_spikes: Volcano level: environmental hazard introduction and narrative danger spike
Form-locked level sequences: mechanical constraint forcing single-character mastery
Witch Doctor boss: culmination of dual-form mechanics under pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Progression from Maui the detective (armed with insect launcher) through martial arts training grounds to Cold Shadow mastery. Spatial design reflects story: mansion exploration (detective work) → training grounds (transformation unlock) → combat domains (ninja mastery)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Creepy mansion → Ancient ninja training grounds

notable_level_patterns.description: Specific levels prevent transformation entirely, forcing players to excel with single form. Bungee vine jumping unavailable to Cold Shadow creates exclusive Maui sections, demanding tactical adaptation

Hazard intensity increases through level sequence: tropical island → mansion → volcanic sacrifice → underwater remains recovery → land of the dead → Mojo Stronghold. Each realm presents form-specific challenges
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Volcano, underwater level, land of the dead

notable_level_patterns.description: Ninja token collection gates transformation availability and power scaling. Levels designed to encourage token hunting; insufficient tokens forces Maui reliance or backtracking
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All post-Level 2 levels incorporate token placement
